**In other words, it will be a TOTAL DISASTER for our country if the radical Left TAKES control of the Senate. **

We can't let the Democrats WIN on January 5th. Too much is at take to do nothing today, [**which is why I 'm hoping you'll rush an emergency contribution here >>>**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001R2Qgq35_9C0CRVpNp9KD_MTCY99HgKVEBrsWeVlcP5aNN-rG2YW_XiLcBKGzljHP0ZUBS12a6AIu-ibKp8xDccMmRxZWcRWScLueSu1EW58uvmXWvR-G4hvuOXreH1TBcHhoe_riYMm41JPG0nVIPYboi5oFG66DmZWXtxVEvt12TQ60H4UnyRaqXnmLWt4QPWIZYUz0BBhNrdc3CGesPJwgGdw-b2L2_TAMmlbV7y6bhHNIVHjCJameP4K75sCE6Y5cj6QW4OaVdl_Sssnfw2NexfBaAhIXyM5HbDn2_-NtHsDNdECmiMjzjQ5rWbhwa7eAWEaVEedfGR4osHDKCZfMnm5ILKKtTEXeO6ADAuP2i7BpfcSYe78QYiqdPef7zfnELD6aMHohgbdttKK_w370BauH17DLa1-jFSLeUrc=&c=X0Fr4hRBr0h5xBBrXX09d-b253AAGHTFR1bkMHgRckpYq9oOOTImpA==&ch=IUdcH8w0flIXd52pOW3dWUTvd_GnDPsDPr4EZqLx8s4hQ1EF8dHzCA==)

I've always been able to count on your support in the past, Friend, but there has never been so much on the line as there is right now.

body:
Friend,

The radical left has some new strategies to flip the Senate since they failed on November 3rd:

body:

| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE SUNDAY, NOVEMBER 22, 2020
LOEFFLER CAMPAIGN PROVIDES UPDATE ON TEST RESULTS
ATLANTA - Today, Loeffler campaign spokesperson Stephen Lawson issued the following statement:
"Senator Loeffler's previously inconclusive PCR results were retested overnight and the results thankfully came back negative.
Out of an abundance of caution, she will continue to self-isolate and be retested again to hopefully receive consecutive negative test results. We will share those results as they are made available. She will continue to confer with medical experts and follow CDC guidelines."

name: Stephen Lawson (Team Kelly)
subject: KELLY LOEFFLER SUPPORTS TRUMP CAMPAIGN REQUEST FOR RECOUNT IN GEORGIA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE SUNDAY, NOVEMBER 22, 2020
KELLY LOEFFLER SUPPORTS TRUMP CAMPAIGN REQUEST FOR RECOUNT IN GEORGIA
ATLANTA - Today, conservative businesswoman and political outsider Kelly Loeffler issued the following statement in support of the Trump campaign's request for a recount of the November 3, 2020 election in Georgia:
"I fully support President Trump's request for a recount in Georgia. We must match and verify absentee ballot signatures to their corresponding voter registration signatures, investigate all voting irregularities, and count only the votes that were legally cast.
This isn't about politics - this is about the foundation of our democracy. Every Georgian - and every American - deserves to have confidence in the integrity of our state's election results, and this process is the best way to make that happen."
---
| ### Stephen Lawson Communications Director stephen@kellyforsenate.com
---
|
Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler

---
| | Georgians for Kelly Loeffler | 9755 Dogwood Rd Suite 340, Roswell, GA 30075

name: Kelly Dietrich
subject: Today is the last day to apply for Staff Academy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Training Committee, TrainDemocrats
body:
don’t wait to finish your application
| | | | |
---
| | | | Peter — Today is the last day to apply to the 2021 Staff Academy Cohort. Applications are due by 11:59pm ET. [Here is the best link to apply!](https://t.dripemail2.)
---
| [APPLY NOW](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoiM3J1a3R2aTlmeTFxeXNndHRqcTEiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL3RyYWluZGVtb2NyYXRzLm9yZy9zdGFmZi1hY2FkZW15Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPUVtYWlsXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1mdWxsbGlzdFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1zYXB1c2hcdTAwMjZfX3M9bzRibXVhcWpvbGMzcWhkcXZpc3kifQ)
---
We started Staff Academy because we believe campaign leadership and staffers should be representative of our voters.

But far too many potential campaign staffers are pigeon-holed into field organizing positions cycle after cycle, or face major barriers to gaining enter-level experience on campaigns.

These barriers disproportionately affect women, people of color, and trans and non-binary people. Communities we know are filled with strong leaders who should be at the forefront of electoral work.

Staff Academy helps remove those barriers.

It’s intensive training for progressive leaders, like you, to learn campaign strategy, sharpen your leadership skills, and broaden your political network.

And it’s provided for free to all accepted cohort members.

[So, if you’re passionate about electing Democrats and are looking for your next big break in politics, click here to learn more about the Staff Academy program and why you should apply.](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoiM3J1a3R2aTlmeTFxeXNndHRqcTEiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL3RyYWluZGVtb2NyYXRzLm9yZy9zdGFmZi1hY2FkZW15Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPUVtYWlsXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1mdWxsbGlzdFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1zYXB1c2hcdTAwMjZfX3M9bzRibXVhcWpvbGMzcWhkcXZpc3kifQ)
| [LEARN MORE](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoiM3J1a3R2aTlmeTFxeXNndHRqcTEiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL3RyYWluZGVtb2NyYXRzLm9yZy9zdGFmZi1hY2FkZW15Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPUVtYWlsXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1mdWxsbGlzdFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1zYXB1c2hcdTAwMjZfX3M9bzRibXVhcWpvbGMzcWhkcXZpc3kifQ)
---
And don’t forget, the application deadline is TONIGHT at 11:59pm ET!
Onward,

— Kelly

Kelly Dietrich
Founder and CEO
National Democratic Training Committee
|

clean_body: don’t wait to finish your application | | | | | | | | | Peter — Today is the last day to apply to the 2021 Staff Academy Cohort. Applications are due by 11:59pm ET. | We started Staff Academy because we believe campaign leadership and staffers should be representative of our voters. But far too many potential campaign staffers are pigeon-holed into field organizing positions cycle after cycle, or face major barriers to gaining enter-level experience on campaigns. These barriers disproportionately affect women, people of color, and trans and non-binary people. Communities we know are filled with strong leaders who should be at the forefront of electoral work. Staff Academy helps remove those barriers. It’s intensive training for progressive leaders, like you, to learn campaign strategy, sharpen your leadership skills, and broaden your political network. And it’s provided for free to all accepted cohort members. | And don’t forget, the application deadline is TONIGHT at 11:59pm ET! Onward, — Kelly Kelly Dietrich Founder and CEO National Democratic Training Committee | | | | |

name: Latinos for Trump
subject: March for 45 with Latinos for Trump December 12 in DC
body:
March for 45 in DC * * * Patriots: We are calling for all patriots loyal to the constitution of the United States of America to show up and be coun
| |
---
[](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/223571?id=283127.1834.1.316a7a3c3a3ca7efa4b077de9acdd9d9) |
---
**March for 45 in DC**
* * *
---
Patriots: We are calling for all patriots loyal to the constitution of the United States of America to show up and be counted! The swamp has done everything possible to eradicate patriotism in our nation. On November 3rd over 70 million Americans cast their vote in support of our president and in support of saving our republic. The swamp has responded by attempting to steal our votes, lie about us in the media, attack our civil liberties with unconstitutional orders, censor our voices, and attack our businesses with unlawful mandates. We must not let this stand. As Americans we have a duty to defend this country in times of adversity and when it is under attack. This IS one of those times. We had over a million patriots show up to DC last time and we need to see that again. This is a call to action for every red-blooded American. We will peacefully assemble at Freedom Plaza in Washington DC at 12pm on December 12th and march for the nation. The whole world is watching. Let them see and hear that the spirit of liberty is not dead in our nation. For God and country! RSVP now! MarchFor45.com
latinosfortrump.us If you have already registered you can still do more. Tell everyone you know about this event. Share it on social media. Gather groups of friends to come. Set up caravans into DC. Do anything and everything in a legal fashion to help us pack the capital of this country. It’s now or never. The march is free and open to the public. Registration is not necessary. However, with the attempts by big tech to shut us down it is imperative that we have other ways to reach out to you so we encourage registration. There will also be other events happening in DC December 11th-13th and we will send you details via email. We are all in this together. God bless YOU ALL!
---
Saturday, December 12, 2020
12 Noon
Freedom Plaza
---
| | [ RSVP Now ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/223571?id=283127.1835.1.c9ad6f4d7ec63a1a54afdc8b256fa543)

name: True the Vote
subject: Join True the Vote LIVE at 6:45 am CT/7:45 am ET for a Georgia Update
body:
Watch TTV Live for commentary and reaction around the Georgia Election Board hearing on emergency rules.
| | | | [](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkY=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=325A747A20A3323)
---
| | True the Vote is going LIVE tomorrow morning at 6:45 am CT / 7:45 am ET!

The Georgia Secretary of State has called a [special State Election Board webinar meeting tomorrow at 8:00 am ET](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZ3cC1jb250ZW50JTJGdXBsb2FkcyUyRkFnZW5kYS1Ob3ZlbWJlci0yMy0yMDIxLnBkZg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=325A747A20A3332) to present and consider emergency rules on absentee ballot drop boxes, processing absentee ballots prior to Election Day, and determination of residency. Join TTV for a live stream of the hearing as Founder and President Catherine Engelbrecht provides commentary and reaction.

[Click here for the meeting agenda.](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZ3cC1jb250ZW50JTJGdXBsb2FkcyUyRkFnZW5kYS1Ob3ZlbWJlci0yMy0yMDIxLnBkZg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=325A747A20A3332)

Friend,

Did you hear the big news?

Governor Holcomb announced two excellent new hires for Indiana last week -- **with Dr. Katie Jenner as Indiana’s first-ever secretary of education, and Karrah A. Herring as Indiana’s first-ever chief equity, inclusion and opportunity officer!**

Dr. Katie Jenner is the perfect person to lead Indiana’s critical education efforts in a time when the future of education has perhaps never been more important to our state.

Karrah Herring also brings the experience and passion needed as our state’s chief equity, inclusion and opportunity officer. She’ll work tirelessly to drive systemic change, improve state government operations, and develop strategies to remove hurdles in government workplaces and services -- just like Governor Holcomb laid out in his statewide address on equity in August.
_“This is an incredibly important time for education in Indiana. Dr. Katie Jenner has focused her entire career on investing in students, teachers and staff, and she will continue to build the relationships needed to move our state forward in constructive ways. As Indiana’s Secretary of Education, Dr. Jenner’s certification, work at nearly every level of education and her remarkable depth of experience will lead our state into this exciting next chapter.” - Governor Eric Holcomb_

_“My goal is to better build diversity and foster an inclusive environment within state government and the services we provide so every Hoosier can take full advantage of their gifts and potential. Karrah will guide every state agency with her impressive experience at one of our state’s world-renowned universities.” - Governor Eric Holcomb_
Dr. Jenner brings experience as a K-12 teacher, school administrator, district administrator, and a vice president at Ivy Tech. Throughout the COVID-19 pandemic, she has served as Governor Holcomb’s senior education advisor.

Herring currently serves as the director of public affairs for the University of Notre Dame, a role she has held since 2011. Before that, she served on Notre Dame's Human Resource's Senior Leadership Team as director of the Office of Institutional Equity and Title IX coordinator.

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: REMINDER: New guidance in effect
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
As we head into the holiday season, please remember that we've made an important, immediate change to the state's COVID-19 prevention guidance:
The social gathering limit has been lowered to a single household. This means you should not be spending time socially with anyone you don't live with, including on Thanksgiving. It also means that you should not be traveling at all this Thanksgiving, whether it's five blocks, the next town over, or crossing state lines. We're asking you to stay home and celebrate only with the people you live with.
I know that this isn't easy -- I'm going to be missing seeing my extended family in-person this year too. But the amount of community transmission is too high right now to take a chance, no matter how safe you may feel. Choosing to gather across multiple households puts yourself, the people you are with, and anyone you interact with for the next two weeks in danger of getting the virus. So while this may not be easy, it's necessary, and I hope that you'll find a way to celebrate with friends and family remotely. If we all do it, we can turn things around and save lives.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001a0CcHNSGH2yQ9hhI3sxiESXttqNL0_71K6pONcKm7VICkkL_Tnuvm3MSFpj6h8MEvk4ixZPAa35S-JzUbvWiBWb9-oOCXSRmywfg96RQDsMpXm9r7dtXiYD03rKJ7a8_hIJ-QFHCiXt0wWaG3y5CyB-AKZdiRhng1TSlM5KjDJV7vQwUIQ5AfWD-gNGU0ZbPrEFcUN1xe6C6zR3IjdX2d2kN6LG5JhOyaiFN6ZMEmrTppAOH9kk5N5ZEoK4pc17IK-8f7q-pl1KS7572RNEXTVO4m7HlYSvd8MfunxaXNieLm1DCH77IzhIg6umYGv1D2qN-Pu8l18E=&c=m0DHrrSnWiKpt9i3V9qaQaYZePfC4jcc1pmOpWQT-ZmRw1ROWaX0IQ==&ch=KMhOfdLG5-9ACbCVZ7Ft3kdIFzjlTxXXXuTfg1cqrQm-jf1eY83njQ==).

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Did You See What Mort Did?
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=stand_with_mort&n=1)
---
Peter \-- Too many people are sheep, begging to be ruled by the Governor. That's why our Tyrant-in-the-Making Tim Walz thinks he can prohibit us from having people over at our own homes. In fact, he thinks he can punish violators with 90 days in jail. **We REFUSE to be ruled by Tyrant Tim.** That's why I was happy to see our star candidate and newly elected legislator, Erik Mortensen (Mort, for short), publicly defy Governor Walz. Did you see what he did? _Mort is hosting a backyard party at his home this week with 20 friends. Unlike most cowardly legislators who are too afraid to publicly stand up to the Governor, Mort wrote a letter to Walz and Attorney General Keith Ellison inviting them over for his defiant act. He was challenging them to come arrest him!_ You see, if courageous leaders defy the Governor publicly, it undermines his credibility to enforce his illegal dictates. That's why Mort's act is so great. Is Walz willing to arrest a duly elected legislator?
## Imagine the headline: Walz Arrests Political Opponent.
That's what's at stake. Mort is willing to go to jail over this fight for our liberty. Do you Stand with Mort? Check out his video: [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=JgIBoJDRsS4q5gIGXkALnVC4qToiwtw5ZaqCZe0hnJ8&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=stand_with_mort&n=2) Governor Walz' illegal orders MUST be disobeyed or I fear we may lose this Republic many have fought and given their lives for. Civil disobedience, at this point, is the only way to undermine his dictates. But don't worry, we will be a thorn in the side of Republican and Democrat legislators once they show up to the Capitol for the December Special Session. When Walz inevitably extends his Emergency Powers for another 30 days, he must call back the Legislature. Action 4 Liberty will reach out to you soon on where the best pressure points are in getting them to End Walz' Emergency Powers once and for all. **In the meantime, we MUST Stand with Mort and defy Walz. Let's show this Tyrant he has no authority over us!** Representative-Elect Erik Mortensen is a liberty champion that YOU helped put in office. He beat Walz' crony "yes-man", Brad Tabke, in the November election. Now he's willing to stand up for YOUR liberties. Will you stand with Mort?
## [STAND WITH MORT PLEDGE](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=kZuFY8l3J9G8vE1AIGepPWV7YN0BIFTIH67mjip8rcF3WesTZRDd3SyBtzK_Q-Sm&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=stand_with_mort&n=3)
**In Liberty,

** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=stand_with_mort&n=4).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=stand_with_mort&n=5).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=stand_with_mort&n=6), software for leaders.
